# Pull Request

## 📝 Description
Brief description of the changes made.

## 🔍 Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/formatting changes
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvements
- [ ] 🧪 Adding tests

## 🧪 Testing
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Performance impact assessed

## 📋 Quality Gates Checklist
- [ ] ✅ TypeScript compilation successful
- [ ] ✅ ESLint checks pass
- [ ] ✅ Build successful
- [ ] ✅ Code health score > 80
- [ ] ✅ Security audit clean
- [ ] ✅ Bundle size within limits
- [ ] ✅ Performance budget met

## 📷 Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots or GIFs of the changes.

## 🔗 Related Issues
Closes #(issue number)

## 📱 Mobile Testing
- [ ] Tested on mobile devices
- [ ] Touch interactions work correctly
- [ ] Responsive design verified

## 🚀 Deployment Notes
Any special deployment considerations or environment variables needed.

---

**Note**: This PR will automatically trigger code health checks and performance audits. Please ensure all quality gates pass before requesting review.
